items.name: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
items.desc: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

items.name: google-ai-edge/gallery
items.desc: A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.

items.name: aaif-goose/goose
items.desc: an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM

items.name: immich-app/immich
items.desc: High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

items.name: KeygraphHQ/shannon
items.desc: Shannon Lite is an autonomous, white-box AI pentester for web applications and APIs. It analyzes your source code, identifies attack vectors, and executes real exploits to prove vulnerabilities before they reach production.

items.name: NousResearch/hermes-agent
items.desc: The agent that grows with you

items.name: tobi/qmd
items.desc: mini cli search engine for your docs, knowledge bases, meeting notes, whatever. Tracking current sota approaches while being all local

items.name: kepano/obsidian-skills
items.desc: Agent skills for Obsidian. Teach your agent to use Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas, and use the CLI.

items.name: ollama/ollama
items.desc: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

items.name: siddharthvaddem/openscreen
items.desc: Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.
